introduction: Can you read a word without sounding it out? That's what we call a SIGHT WORD! Today we explore: Use simple sentences with proper intonation (pitch, juncture. Let's build your reading superpowers! 🦸

vocabulary.definition: A group of words that expresses a complete thought.
